subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: In this Cause, he who is active and who makes an effort will always meet with success. In worldly matters how often we see
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @bringing forth results; fruit, @service to others; to the Cause of God
